text: The dim hallway behind me seeps into shadows, hinting at the unknown, and unsettles me with its emptiness. Yet here in the softly glowing light of this exhibit, I feel a sense of curiosity and introspection. The space is charged with possibility—scientific exploration mingles with creative thought. I am aware of both hesitation and inspiration, marveling at how knowledge, displayed so neatly here, always seems on the edge of mystery.
